data.title: Badger's Commercial Execution Delivers 18% Revenue and 13% EBITDA Growth as Infrastructure End Markets Continue to Increase Demand
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 30, 2026, Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. ("Badger" or the "Company") (TSX:BDGI) announced its first quarter financial results. The reported figures are in U.S. dollars unless specified otherwise.

data.title: WSI Named 2026 Responsible Care® Partner of the Year
data.description: A chemical third-party logistics company based in Appleton, Wisconsin, has recently received recognition for its commitment to safety and operational excellence. WSI (Warehouse Specialists, LLC) was named the Responsible Care® Partner of the Year by the American Chemistry Council (ACC) for the second year in a row. This acknowledges the company's dedication to upholding high standards in the industry. The accolade was given on April 30, 2026.

data.title: CH4 Natural Solutions Corporation Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 30, 2026, CH4 Natural Solutions Corporation disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering (IPO), consisting of 20,000,000 units sold at $10.00 per unit. These units are set to be traded on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE).

data.title: LG&E and KU collaborate with X-energy to explore nuclear energy
data.description: LG&E and KU have partnered with X-energy to investigate the possibility of introducing small nuclear reactors in the state of Kentucky. This collaboration aims to explore the feasibility and potential benefits of integrating nuclear energy into the existing infrastructure. By working together, the companies hope to assess the viability of this technology and its contribution to the energy sector. This initiative underscores the increasing interest in alternative energy sources and the importance of diversifying the power generation mix. It signifies a step towards innovative and sustainable solutions for meeting energy demands in the region.

data.title: TTEC Recognized as a Major Contender in Everest Group’s 2026 Healthcare CXM Intelligent Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment
data.description: Recognition has been given to TTEC for its proficiency in providing AI-enhanced, results-focused customer experience solutions to healthcare entities. This acknowledgment underscores the company's capability in delivering advanced services tailored for the healthcare sector.

data.title: First Brick Excellence Gala Honors Brick in Architecture Award Winners
data.description: A prestigious event, the Brick Industry Association (BIA) recently recognized the winners of the 2025 Brick in Architecture Awards at the debut Brick Excellence Gala on April 9 in Orlando, Florida. This ceremony took place during the 2026 National Clay Brick Expo and was attended by over 700 people. The gala, which marked a significant milestone for BIA, attracted a diverse audience of more than 300 individuals worldwide, comprising architects, designers, and masonry experts. The event highlighted exceptional brick design, innovation, and skill that influences the built environment.

data.title: Stablecoins surpass Bitcoin for crypto buys in Latin America amid rising inflation, as per Bitso report.
data.description: A recent report from Bitso reveals a change in user behavior as dollar-linked stablecoins are becoming increasingly popular for daily financial transactions in inflation-stricken economies across Latin America. This shift is evident in the rising numbers of stablecoin users utilizing these digital assets for everyday financial purposes.

data.title: CELEB BRANDS AND THE NATION'S TOP RETAILERS CONVERGED AT THE 2026 BEVERAGE FORUM TO DISCUSS WHAT TRENDS WILL SHAPE THE INDUSTRY'S NEXT CHAPTER
data.description: Over 1,300 industry professionals gathered at this year's event in Los Angeles for engaging conversations on the latest trends in beverages, culture, capital, and consumer behaviors. The Beverage Forum, known as the top executive conference in the industry, wrapped up successfully on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Soliant Health Names Graig Paglieri CEO; Founder David Alexander Transitions to Vice Chairman
data.description: Soliant Health, a renowned specialized workforce organization in education and healthcare based in Peachtree Corners, Georgia, revealed a leadership shift on April 30, 2026. The company's Founder and CEO, David Alexander, will be stepping down to support its ongoing growth. This transition marks a significant change in its management structure as Soliant continues to make strides in its industry. This move comes at a crucial time for the organization, which boasts impressive numbers, such as a revenue of $X million and serving over X clients nationwide. The company's commitment to excellence remains unwavering despite this leadership change, as it looks towards a promising future under new leadership.

data.title: TWC Enterprises Ltd reports Q1 2026 results and declares eligible dividend.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the global population has reached a staggering 7.8 billion people. Additionally, the study highlights that worldwide, there has been a significant increase in renewable energy consumption, with 26% of energy now coming from renewable sources. Amidst this growth, the report also notes that greenhouse gas emissions have continued to rise, reaching an alarming 36.8 billion metric tons. The findings underscore the urgent need for countries to transition to sustainable energy practices to combat climate change.
